title: Cobalt Wash Player UI
summary: An SSE-driven “now playing” UI with a blurred, drifting cobalt wash background and a lyric-window display.
description: A static-first UI pattern that consumes Server-Sent Events for live updates while keeping interactions and motion lightweight. Focused on readable typography, minimal controls, and a background that feels alive without becoming noisy.

image.alt: Cobalt Wash Player UI cover image
